title: Tephroseris pseudosonchus
intro: Tephroseris pseudosonchus, also known as a type of dandelion or Sonchus-like plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting liver function due to its diuretic and hepatoprotective properties. The bioactive constituents of Tephroseris pseudosonchus include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tephroseris pseudosonchus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into herbal remedies for its supposed health benefits.
